content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.handler_benchmark
FILE: cosmos/core/handler_benchmark.py (806 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Dynamic Handler Benchmarking System.

"I'm going to make them compete! May the best robot win!"

This module implements competitive benchmarking for handlers, providers, and agents,
enabling dynamic selection based on real-time performance rather than static capability matching.

AGI Feature 

CLASSES:
- BenchmarkType(Enum): Types of benchmarks for different task categories.
- ProviderCapability(Enum): Special capabilities of different providers.
- BenchmarkResult: Result of a single benchmark run.
  Methods: def overall_score(self, weights: dict[str, float]=None) -> float
- HandlerProfile: Profile tracking handler performance over time.
  Methods: def update_with_result(self, result: BenchmarkResult, alpha: float=0.2)
  Methods: def get_score_for_type(self, benchmark_type: BenchmarkType) -> float
- BenchmarkTask: A benchmark task for competitive evaluation.
- TournamentResult: Result of a handler tournament.
- HandlerBenchmarkEngine: Engine for competitive handler benchmarking and dynamic selection.

Features:
- 
  Methods: def register_handler(self, profile: HandlerProfile)
  Methods: def set_executor(self, executor: Callable)
  Methods: async def benchmark_handler(self, handler_id: str, task: BenchmarkTask, executor: Optional[Callable]
  Methods: async def run_tournament(self, handler_ids: list[str], task: BenchmarkTask, top_n: int=1) -> Tournam
  Methods: def select_best_handlers(self, benchmark_type: BenchmarkType, required_capabilities: Optional[list[P
  Methods: def get_handler_for_task(self, task_description: str, required_capabilities: Optional[list[ProviderC
  Methods: def get_provider_recommendation(self, benchmark_type: BenchmarkType) -> dict[str, str]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_best_handler(task: str, capabilities: list[ProviderCapability]=None) -> Tuple[str, HandlerProfile]
- def get_coding_handler() -> Tuple[str, float]
- def get_research_handler() -> Tuple[str, float]
- def get_trading_handler() -> Tuple[str, float]
